mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 220 in the CPIAUCSL series signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite CPIAUCSL > 220.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals robust supply-side expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings prospects.
failure_condition: Rank IC for combined GDPC1/INDPRO signals falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day returns show no correlation with the composite indicator.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production (INDPRO) during a supply shock regime indicates production bottlenecks, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite INDPRO declines > 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment (UNRATE) above 7% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through reduced consumer spending expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite UNRATE > 7%.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts (HOUST) indicate strong demand for residential construction, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through sectoral momentum effects.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances when HOUST rises > 1%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong job gains (PAYEMS) above 150k signal a tightening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite PAYEMS > 150k.

mechanism_narrative: A monetary tightening cycle (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%) leads to higher discount rates, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through reduced equity valuations.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite FEDFUNDS > 4.5%.
